title: Football / World Cup Trophy Emoji 🏆 Copy & Paste
meta_description: Copy and paste the football and World Cup trophy emoji 🏆 plus medals 🥇🥈🥉, crown 👑, and champion combos. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The trophy emoji and every champion symbol — cups, medals, crowns, and winning combos. Click any emoji to copy it.
intro: There is no dedicated World Cup trophy emoji, so fans reach for the classic trophy 🏆 plus medals and crowns to celebrate a win. This page collects the trophy, the gold, silver, and bronze medals, the crown, and ready-made champion combos you can drop into a victory post. Click any emoji to copy it.
